calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-13-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: June Leathley.
Petitioners: Jose Antonio Villalpando and Margarita Castorena, are present in pro per as guardian ad litem for the Minor: Guadalupe Villalpando, and with Spanish Interprer from ACCESS: Malea Chavez.
Petitioners and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Jose Guadalupe Villalpando Castorena.
Decree signed in open court.
